water-softener.title: D'Cal Independent House Water Softener
water-softener.desc: Drop-in tank softener for independent homes. Stops scaling, hair fall and skin irritation. Lasts 12 months per cartridge.

shower-filter.title: D'Cal Shower Head Filter
shower-filter.desc: Easy install with 14-stage filtration. Reduces hair fall and dry skin. 6-month replaceable cartridge.

tap-filter.title: D'Cal Tap Filter
tap-filter.desc: No fitting needed — just hang it on the tap. Reduces hair fall and skin irritation from hard water.

washing-ball.title: D'Cal Washing Machine Ball
washing-ball.desc: Just drop it in your washing machine. Cuts detergent use and keeps your garments looking new.

tap-tile-cleaner.title: D'Cal Tap & Tile Cleaner
tap-tile-cleaner.desc: Restores the natural shine of taps & tiles. Gentle water-based formula. Spray it, scrub it, wash it.
